name: conditional-precedence
description: Table with firstRow (blue), lastRow (yellow), firstCol (green), lastCol (red) conditionals. All tblLook flags enabled.
expected_behavior: Per §17.7.6 precedence: firstCol/lastCol > firstRow/lastRow. Cell (0,0): green (firstCol > firstRow). Cell (0,2): red (lastCol > firstRow). Cell (3,0): green (firstCol > lastRow). Cell (3,2): red (lastCol > lastRow). Cell (0,1): blue (firstRow only). Cell (3,1): yellow (lastRow only). Cell (1,0): green (firstCol only). Cell (1,2): red (lastCol only).
current_status: GAP — precedence order in apply_conditional_formatting is wrong
